mapper.select:
SELECT space.id , space.deleted , space.created_at as createdAt , space.modified_at as modifiedAt
, space.work_name as workName , space.space_code as spaceName , group.group_name as groupName FROM space LEFT JOIN group ON space.id = group.space_id WHERE space.id = #{id}
SELECT space.id FROM space WHERE space.id is not null
